Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charron O'Neil, via Zoom, for William Matteson Jr., Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the probate matters in France and Great Britain. The court determines that San Francisco is the proper venue as the debt is an asset of the decedent and the decedent's MasterCard account was active at the time of her death.

Upon additional consideration, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. William R. Matteson Jr. is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen A. Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-16-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
